technical_skills.title: Competenze tecniche
technical_skills.programming_principles_desc: Algoritmi e strutture dati, complessità computazionale, paradigmi di programmazione (concorrente, dichiarativa, funzionale, imperativa, procedurale, reattiva, orientata agli oggetti), machine learning.
technical_skills.system_programming_desc: API Linux, Bash, Python, C, C++, Java, Javascript, Rust, Go, sistemi di build (CMake, Make, Maven, Gradle, Cargo, Poetry, Npm, Pnpm).
technical_skills.web_frameworks_desc: Angular, Next.js, Nuxt, Express, Django, FastAPI, Ruby on Rails.
technical_skills.frontend_web_desc: Angular, React, Vue, Bootstrap, JQuery, Sass, Tailwind, Shadcn.
technical_skills.frontend_mobile_desktop_desc: Android SDK, Google Play Services, Flutter, Cordova, React Native, Gtk, Qt, Gnome SDK.
technical_skills.databases_desc: Firebase, Supabase, MongoDB, Mysql, PostgreSQL, Sqlite.
technical_skills.devops_desc: AWS (VPC, EC2, ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, Route 53, CloudFront, Lambda, API Gateway, IAM, CloudWatch, SNS, SQS, CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy, CloudFormation, SDK Node), Azure, Docker, Git, Github Actions, Nginx, SSH, SSL, GnuPG.
technical_skills.data_science_desc: Jupyter, MatPlotLib, NumPy, Pytorch, Pandas, SciPy.
technical_skills.embedded_desc: Arduino SDK, Sistemi IOT (MQTT, Zigbee), simulazioni elettroniche con SPICE.
technical_skills.multimedia_software_desc: FreeCAD, KiCAD, Blender, Cairo, Ffmpeg, Gimp, Inkscape, Imagemagick, Latex, Pandoc, Godot, Krita, Neovim, Code OSS, Ardour, Olive Video Editor, OBS Studio, Audacity.
